headline: Steve Cohen’s Point72 Is Aggressively Buying These 3 Stocks. Here’s Why They’re Worth a Closer Look
summary: Steve Cohen isn’t known for making slow, passive bets. Through Point72 Asset Management, he runs one of the most aggressive multi-strategy hedge funds in the world, constantly reallocating capital toward where his team sees the best risk-reward. Last quarter, that meant leaning hard into three very different names: TransDigm Group (NYSE:TDG), PepsiCo (NASDAQ:PEP), and Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX). On ... Steve Cohen’s Point72 Is Aggressively Buying These 3 Stocks. Here’s Why They’re Worth a Closer Look

headline: 3 Big Reasons to Love TransDigm (TDG)
summary: Since October 2025, TransDigm has been in a holding pattern, posting a small loss of 3.2% while floating around $1,287. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 5.8% gain during that period.
